name: Asparagus with Yogurt Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the garlic, lemon juice, prepared mustard, salt, and pepper.
2. Stir in the parsley, dill, and yogurt until well combined.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 60 minutes (or up to several hours) before serving to allow flavors to meld.
4. Serve the sauce over steamed asparagus.
